problem.title: Bucket Sort (Float Values 0–1)
problem.description:
Problem: Given n real numbers in [0,1), sort using bucket sort algorithm.
Distribute into buckets, sort each, concatenate.

solution.explanation: Distribute numbers into n buckets, sort each bucket with insertion sort, then print in order.
solution.time_complexity: O(n) on average, O(n^2) worst case
